# Bowl of Data

> A weekly digest of the most relevant tech stories

Bowl of Data is a weekly newsletter powered by Maki, an AI pipeline that curates and summarises the most relevant tech stories from hundreds of sources each week. Coverage spans AI & machine learning, cybersecurity, blockchain & crypto, and software engineering.

## Issues

- [Week 28 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/28_2026.html): 23 articles. Highlights: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation; KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning; From RGB Generation to Dense Field Readout: Pixel-Space Dense Prediction with Text-to-Image Models.
- [Week 27 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/27_2026.html): 21 articles. Highlights: CitrixBleed To Infinity And Beyond (Citrix NetScaler Pre-Auth Memory Overread CVE-2026-8451) - watchTowr Labs; It’s 37oC, And All We Can Think About Is ColdFusion (Adobe ColdFusion Security Bulletin APSB26-68 CVE Bonanza) - watchTowr Labs; Auditing OpenReception: 16 CVEs in an end-to-end encrypted appointment booking platform (unauthenticated admin creation, account takeover, E2E bypass).
- [Week 26 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/26_2026.html): 23 articles. Highlights: Trump Orders Acceleration of Quantum Readiness as Bitcoin Faces Coming Risk; Europe Expands Quantum-GPU Computing as NVIDIA Announces 35 New AI Supercomputers; How Many Qubits Does a Quantum Computer Need?.
- [Week 25 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/25_2026.html): 11 articles. Highlights: SearchLeak: How We Turned M365 Copilot Into a One-Click Data Exfiltration Weapon; Your Privacy My Cloak: Backdoor Attacks on Differentially Private Federated Learning; APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization.
- [Week 24 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/24_2026.html): 12 articles. Highlights: Claude Fable & Mythos released by Anthropic; Signal Alums Reveal ‘Encrypted Spaces,’ a System for Making Private Collaboration Apps; Jupyter Enterprise Gateway - From Notebook to Kubernetes Cluster Admin - elttam.
- [Week 23 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/23_2026.html): 14 articles. Highlights: Microsoft Reveals '1,000x More Reliable' Quantum Chip as Bitcoin Threat Draws Nearer; Red Hat npm packages compromised to steal developer credentials; Mastercard expands onchain settlement in bet on stablecoins and always-on finance.
- [Week 22 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/22_2026.html): 13 articles. Highlights: Beyond a Single Quantum Chip: Why the Future of Quantum Computing is Modular; US's big bet on quantum computing may not be entirely legal; What scanners are actually trying against AI infrastructure.
- [Week 21 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/21_2026.html): 51 articles. Highlights: Article: Kernel-Level Ground Truth: Why eBPF is Replacing User-Space Agents for Security Observability; The SEC Is About to Allow Tokenized Stocks on Blockchain; Aramco and Pasqal Launch Commercial Quantum Computing as a Service Platform in Saudi Arabia.
- [Week 20 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/20_2026.html): 13 articles. Highlights: Postmortem: TanStack npm supply-chain compromise; Giving Claude Code Full Control of a Hardware Fault Injection Setup to Bypass Secure Boot; Hackers Used AI to Develop First Known Zero-Day 2FA Bypass for Mass Exploitation.
- [Week 19 · 2026](https://bowlofdata.net/week/19_2026.html): 13 articles. Highlights: Uber Shares What Happens When 1.500 AI Agents Hit Production; We probed 6,000 web apps for Stripe webhook signature checks. 1,542 don't bother; Bleeding Llama: Critical Unauthenticated Memory Leak in Ollama (CVE-2026–7482).

## Pages

- [Archive](https://bowlofdata.net/archive.html): Index of all past issues
- [Services](https://bowlofdata.net/services.html): Newsletter on Demand — we build and run your newsletter
- [About](https://bowlofdata.net/about.html): Mission, topics covered, and how the pipeline works
- [Team](https://bowlofdata.net/team.html): About the people and AI behind Bowl of Data
- [Contact](https://bowlofdata.net/contact.html): Feedback and article suggestions

## Optional

- [Subscribe](https://bowlofdata.substack.com/): Free weekly newsletter on Substack
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/bowl_of_data): Follow on Instagram
- [Podcast (Spotify)](https://open.spotify.com/show/033Mqus9YAIssepHakRIIk): Listen to Bowl of Data as a podcast
